scale_min.description: Minimum value on the rating scale (e.g., 1 for 1-5 stars).

scale_max.description: Maximum value on the rating scale (e.g., 5 for 5-star).

count.description: Number of reviews contributing to the rating.

distribution.description: Per-bucket review counts so agents can detect patterns like bimodal distributions that an average would obscure. Sum of bucket counts SHOULD equal `count`.

buckets.description: One entry per discrete scale value. Continuous scales bucket at integers by default; producers grading at half-integers MAY include half-integer bucket values.

value.description: Bucket value on the rating scale. MUST fall within `scale_min`/`scale_max`.

count.description: Number of reviews at this bucket value.

verified_count.description: Number of reviews from verified purchasers. MUST be less than or equal to `count`. The definition of "verified" is business-defined (e.g., purchase confirmed, identity-linked).
